ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "pid" INTEGER /* Project identifier (PID) for the study */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the individual within the project */,
  "fid" INTEGER /* ID of the individual's father */,
  "mid" INTEGER /* ID of the individual's mother */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the individual (1: Male, 2: Female) */,
  "aff" INTEGER /* Affection status (1: Unaffected, 2: Affected) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "consent_status" INTEGER /* Consent status of the individual */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the individual gave consent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_pid FOREIGN KEY ("pid") REFERENCES projects ("pid")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "pid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pid")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_markers" (
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic marker */,
  "marker_name" TEXT /* Name of the genetic marker */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the marker is located */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the marker on the chromosome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marker */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene associated with the marker */,
  "function" TEXT /* Function of the marker */,
  "associated_traits" TEXT /* Traits or diseases associated with the marker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genotype_data" (
  "genotype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genotype record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic marker */,
  "allele_1" TEXT /* First allele of the genotype */,
  "allele_2" TEXT /* Second allele of the genotype */,
  "genotype_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the genotype data */,
  "genotyping_method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the genotype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genotype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genotype_data_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genotype_data_marker_id FOREIGN KEY ("marker_id") REFERENCES genetic_markers ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship record */,
  "individual_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first individual in the relationship */,
  "individual_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second individual in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, child, sibling) */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship */,
  "relationship_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score for the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_individual_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id_1") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_individual_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id_2") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trait_definitions" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the trait or disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trait or disease */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the trait */,
  "inheritance_pattern" TEXT /* Inheritance pattern of the trait */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the trait or disease */,
  "prevalence" TEXT /* Prevalence of the trait or disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trait_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trait or disease */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the observation */,
  "observed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who made the observation */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level for the observation */,
  "method_of_observation" TEXT /* Method used to make the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trait_observations_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trait_observations_trait_id FOREIGN KEY ("trait_id") REFERENCES trait_definitions ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_users" (
  "project_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-user relationship */,
  "pid" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_within_project" TEXT /* Role of the user within the project */,
  "date_joined_project" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the project */,
  "last_access" TEXT /* Date of the user's last access to the project data */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions granted to the user within the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_users_pid FOREIGN KEY ("pid") REFERENCES projects ("pid")
)
